ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_involved_players" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the event (e.g., passer, receiver, scorer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., attacking, defending, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_number" INTEGER /* Number of the period */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Starting time of the period */,
  "end_time" REAL /* Ending time of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)
column_names: Role of the player in the event (e.g., passer, receiver, scorer)
Unique identifier for each type of event
Category of the event (e.g., attacking, defending, neutral)
Identifier for the team the player belongs to
Position of the player on the field
